title: Annual Day Celebrations 2024
description: A grand celebration with dance performances, skits, and songs by our little stars. Parents joined us for a memorable evening of joy and laughter.

title: Sports Day - Little Champions
description: Our tiny athletes showcased their skills in running races, sack races, and relay events. Every child was a winner!

title: Diwali Celebration
description: Children decorated diyas, made rangoli, and learned about the festival of lights. The school was beautifully decorated with colors and lamps.

title: Independence Day Flag Hoisting
description: Patriotic songs, tricolor crafts, and a special flag hoisting ceremony. Children learned about our freedom fighters.

title: Art & Craft Exhibition
description: A colorful exhibition showcasing the creative artwork of our students - paintings, clay models, paper crafts, and more!

title: Graduation Ceremony 2023
description: Our senior batch bid farewell with a beautiful graduation ceremony. Caps, gowns, and proud parents made it a day to remember.

title: Field Trip to Zoo
description: An exciting trip to the local zoo where children got to see exotic animals and learn about wildlife conservation.

title: Christmas Carnival
description: Santa visited Kidzee! Games, gifts, carol singing, and a festive atmosphere made this a magical day for our little ones.

title: Science Workshop
description: Hands-on science experiments that amazed our young scientists. Volcanoes, magnets, and color mixing experiments!

title: Fancy Dress Competition
description: Our kids dressed up as their favorite characters - from superheroes to historical figures. What a colorful display of imagination!
